allow: Bash(for f in index.html projects.html contact.html resume.html projects/*.html)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Steven Van Overmeiren Portfolio Website

Static HTML/CSS/JS portfolio site with ASU maroon & gold branding,
image carousels, scroll animations, embedded PDF viewers, and
responsive design across 14 project detail pages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" auth login --web --git-protocol https)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create SteveWebsite --public --source=. --remote=origin --push)
